title: Ambient Additions
description: Adds more atmospheric critters to your world!
body:
![Corgi](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_banners/1360060648353267712/1658182205/1500x500)

🐌 **Ambient Additions** 🦀
---
This mod adds ambient life to your world and utilities to catch them. The mod includes various fully-animated animals, ranging from adorable corgis to radially-symmetric starfish, shy crabs, and miniature armadillos. The aim is to introduce more fauna into your world, in order to fuel players' zoos and critter-catching habits!  

---
### 🎯 Critter-Catching: Blowguns, Darts, and Crates! 

In order to aid you in collecting and transporting animals, a multitude of the mod's animals are able to be put in buckets, pots, bottles, or bowls. Along with this, we have also added a set of items to sedate and crate any animal in general, especially those that cannot be caught by other means. 

![Crate crafting recipes](https://i.imgur.com/JAIkpxk.png)

#### Crates are a new form of animal transport.

- Empty Crates can be used on sedated entities by right-clicking on them to capture them.
- Entities can be placed from crates by right-clicking again.
- Crates will gain a new texture and enchantment glint when containing a mob and will state the mob contained as a tooltip.

#### Blowguns & Darts allow you to sedate mobs for capture.

- Blowguns are ranged weapons that use darts as ammunition.
- They can be charged similarly to a bow, and fire a single dart projectile accordingly.
- Darts inflict a single level of "stun" on a mob.
![Stunned sloth bear](https://i.imgur.com/iAAcuCd.png)

After a certain number of stuns, a mob will enter a sedated mode for 30 seconds, during which it will display sleepy particles.
The number of stuns required to sedate a mob scales with it's health.

![Stunned mata mata](https://i.imgur.com/zJszoEI.png)

<details>
<summary>Stun requirements</summary>
2.5 hearts = 1 stun
5 hearts = 2 stuns
10 hearts = 3 stuns
25 hearts = 4 stuns
25+ hearts = 5 stuns
</details>
